g.title: claim_0fbd4a8e
g.text: Great Britain cannot govern the continent justly or
conveniently because it is distant, ignorant of American
conditions, and hostile to American liberty and prosperity.

g.title: claim_2ebb7a60
g.text: Dependence on Great Britain draws America into European wars
and quarrels and harms its peace and trade.

g.title: claim_2f26687f
g.text: Reconciliation with Great Britain would likely produce ruin,
instability, or civil conflict in the continent.

g.title: claim_7db151f7
g.text: The American colonies should separate from Great Britain and

g.title: claim_8fd4f779
g.text: Reconciliation with Great Britain no longer offers real
security or a viable settlement for the continent.

g.title: claim_bc484fd4
g.text: Forming an American government of its own is wiser, safer,
and more durable than leaving the seat of government vacant
